identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a professional, high-contrast, and efficient Retail POS system with a 'Factory/Industrial' aesthetic.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Industrial precision with Retail elegance.
Content is King: Data legibility is paramount.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in varying light conditions.

mono.usage: Prices, SKUs, Barcodes, IDs, Tabular data

rules: Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px.
Use 'tracking-wide' for uppercase labels (e.g., table headers).

buttons.default: h-10 px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.default: h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard.
Ensure the POS screen is split: Left 60% for Product Grid, Right 40% for Cart/Checkout.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all monetary values, stock counts, and IDs.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; use solid colors or subtle noise textures if needed.
Maintain a 'Factory/Industrial' clean look - avoid excessive rounded corners (max rounded-lg).
For the 'Mafia' brand feel, use the Dark Mode palette as an option, but default to Light Mode for retail clarity.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
